name: Sealing 04 — State machine vending machine
description: Vending machine FSM avec states (Idle/Selecting/Paying/Dispensing), events (Insert/Cancel/Select). Exerce: ScopeNode, Constraint, Pointing, Pattern, EventPull, EventPush, ResonancePush, ResonancePull, Property. WILL_FAIL_UNTIL_FIX: la résonance 'State:current >>- Insert -> Idle:' suit la sémantique du README (Pointing(ResonancePush,...)), pas le parser actuel right-assoc (cf anomalie #2).
